name: Pusher Channels API
description: Pusher provides real-time messaging infrastructure via WebSockets and HTTP APIs. Use this API to trigger events on channels for real-time updates to connected clients, query active channel information, get connected user lists on presence channels, send batch events, authenticate private/presence channel subscriptions, and deliver push notifications via Pusher Beams.

capabilities.name: events_create
capabilities.description: Trigger an event on one or more channels. Connected clients subscribed to those channels receive the data in real time.

capabilities.name: events_batch_create
capabilities.description: Trigger multiple events in a single HTTP request. Each event can target different channels with different data.

capabilities.name: channels_list
capabilities.description: Get a list of active channels with optional prefix filtering and user count info for presence channels.

capabilities.name: channels_get
capabilities.description: Get detailed information about a specific channel including whether it is occupied and subscriber count.

capabilities.name: channels_users_list
capabilities.description: Get a list of users currently subscribed to a presence channel.

capabilities.name: auth_create
capabilities.description: Authenticate a user for a private or presence channel subscription.

capabilities.name: user_auth_create
capabilities.description: Authenticate a user connection for user-based features (Channels user authentication).

capabilities.name: beams_publish_users
capabilities.description: Send push notifications to specific authenticated users via Pusher Beams.

capabilities.name: beams_publish_interests
capabilities.description: Send push notifications to devices subscribed to specific interests (topics) via Pusher Beams.

capabilities.name: beams_auth_create
capabilities.description: Generate a Beams auth token for a user to receive authenticated push notifications.
